name: evy
description: EVY monorepo - api, web, ios, shared types

scripts.format: bun run --cwd api format && bun run --cwd web format && bun run --cwd services/marketplace format && bunx biome format --write scripts
scripts.install:all: bun install && bun install --cwd api && bun install --cwd web && bun install --cwd services/marketplace
